title: Communicable Diseases and Infection Control Newsletter - Canada.ca
content:
## Communicable Diseases and Infection Control Updates

## Sign up web page for users
Sign up to receive the latest updates from the Centre for Communicable Diseases and Infection Control on new publications, upcoming events, and ongoing projects.
To subscribe to the bulletin, please enter your information below and click on the " Subscribe " button.
Required fields are marked with an asterisk ( * ).

## Change your subscription
To change your subscription email, you must unsubscribe under the previous email address and re-subscribe with the new email address.
If you wish to unsubscribe, type in your email address in the box below, then select the " Unsubscribe " button.
